subcodes.title: Words to a vistor, spoken on 1913-04-20
subcodes.first_line: By Father we mean the Educator. Just as the Father is tender to his children, likewise the instructor teaches them.... Generally, there are three kinds of teachers
subcodes.first_line_orig: معلم یعنی مربی حقیقی که مظهر صفات الهیه است و یکی از صفات او صفت ربوبیت است
subcodes.subjects: @high station of learning, @Manifestation of God as educator, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @Greek philosophers; Greek civilization
